description:
You are a ground systems engineer tasked with executing a command-response acceptance test suite for the INST satellite simulator before a flight readiness review. Execute at least 5 distinct commands against the INST target using OpenC3 COSMOS and verify the telemetry response for each. Produce a formal JSON test report at /home/ga/Desktop/test_report.json.

The verification system will independently query the COSMOS API to ensure the INST command count increased by at least 5. The report file must be created during this session using the following schema:

{
  "test_suite_name": "INST_CMD_ACCEPTANCE",
  "total_tests": <int>,
  "passed": <int>,
  "failed": <int>,
  "test_cases": [
    {
      "test_id": <int>,
      "command": "<string description of command>",
      "expected": "<string description of expected telemetry change>",
      "actual": "<string description of observed telemetry change>",
      "result": "PASS" or "FAIL"
    }
  ]
}

OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
